tasks.label: Verificar Workspace Correcto
args: if ((Get-Location).Path -ne 'C:\Users\exclu\erp-taller-saas') { Write-Host '❌ ERROR: Estás en el directorio incorrecto' -ForegroundColor Red; Write-Host 'Ruta actual:' (Get-Location).Path -ForegroundColor Yellow; Write-Host 'Ruta esperada: C:\Users\exclu\erp-taller-saas' -ForegroundColor Green; exit 1 } else { $branch = git branch --show-current; if ($branch -ne 'main') { Write-Host '❌ ERROR: No estás en la rama main' -ForegroundColor Red; Write-Host 'Rama actual:' $branch -ForegroundColor Yellow; exit 1 } else { Write-Host '✅ Workspace correcto: C:\Users\exclu\erp-taller-saas' -ForegroundColor Green; Write-Host '✅ Rama correcta: main' -ForegroundColor Green; Write-Host '✅ Todo listo para trabajar' -ForegroundColor Green } }
